title: My Girlfriend is Shobitch
sourceNotes: 10-episode anime adapts the start of the 4-koma romance manga (complete at 87 chapters + a special). The anime jumps around the manga's loosely-connected gag chapters rather than following a strict order, with a noticeably faithful stretch through the first ~55 chapters; readers continuing after the anime pick up around volume 5, chapter 56. Chapter ranges are approximate given the anthology-style source.
